data.body:
Investigation RESULT: confirmed.
ROOT_CAUSE: validate-issues.sh get_shared_issues_json() line 189 passes v3 'child_of' relation verbatim (no normalization to 'parent-child'). Both check_child_parent_deps() line 515 AND check_cross_epic_child_deps() line 587 only filter for 'parent-child' type, so legitimate child_of structural links trigger false-positive CRITICALs.
FIX: normalize child_of → parent-child in get_shared_issues_json() at line 189.
RED_TEST: Add to tests/scripts/test-validate-issues.sh — ticket with parent_id + child_of dep to parent should NOT produce CRITICAL.
